ast.name: description
ast.source: Padding of the banner from the edges of the note in pixels.
ast.target: 横幅与笔记边缘的内边距（像素）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move the position of the notes content in pixels.
ast.target: 移动笔记内容的位置（像素）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move the position of the view content in pixels.
ast.target: 移动视图内容的位置（像素）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Size of the border radius in pixels.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fade the image out towards the content.
ast.target: 使图像向内容方向淡出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable or disables the frontmatter/properties autohide feature.
ast.target: 启用或禁用前注/属性自动隐藏功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Name of the banner property this plugin will look for in the frontmatter.
ast.target: 此插件将在前注中查找的横幅属性名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Name of the icon property this plugin will look for in the frontmatter.
ast.target: 此插件将在前注中查找的图标属性名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Name of the datetime property this plugin will look for in the frontmatter.
ast.target: 此插件将在前注中查找的日期时间属性名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Size of the icon in pixels.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable or disable the icon background.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Size of the border in pixels.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Offset the X and Y position of the icon in pixels
ast.target: 以像素为单位偏移图标的X和Y位置

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable or disable the display of a datetime.
ast.target: 启用或禁用日期时间的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show datetime only when a property is set in the note
ast.target: 仅在笔记中设置了属性时显示日期时间

ast.name: description
ast.target: 日期时间的水平对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 日期时间的垂直对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Offset the X and Y position of the datetime in pixels
ast.target: 以像素为单位偏移日期时间的X和Y位置

regex.source: addHeading("Frontmatter",["sbs-heading"]),this.addToggle({title:"Autohide frontmatter/properties",description:"Enable or disables the frontmatter/properties autohide feature."},t.properties,"autohide")
regex.target: addHeading("Frontmatter",["sbs-heading"]),this.addToggle({title:"Autohide frontmatter/properties",description:"Enable or disables the frontmatter/properties autohide feature."},t.properties,"autohide")

regex.source: addHeading("Icon",["sbs-heading"]),this.addToggle({title:"Show icon",description:"Enable or disable the icon.",refreshOnUpdate:!0},t,"iconEnabled")
regex.target: addHeading("Icon",["sbs-heading"]),this.addToggle({title:"Show icon",description:"Enable or disable the icon.",refreshOnUpdate:!0},t,"iconEnabled")

regex.source: addHeading("Datetime",["sbs-heading"]),this.addToggle({title:"Show datetime",description:"Enable or disable the display of a datetime.",refreshOnUpdate:!0},t,"datetimeEnabled")
regex.target: addHeading("Datetime",["sbs-heading"]),this.addToggle({title:"Show datetime",description:"Enable or disable the display of a datetime.",refreshOnUpdate:!0},t,"datetimeEnabled")
